expectations.text: Outlines or executes a multi-step workflow: list cycles, fetch backlog, surface high-priority items
expectations.evidence: Describes what it would do at a high level but does not execute any workflow steps

expectations.text: Presents issues grouped or ordered by priority (high first)
Offers to move items into the next cycle rather than just describing what the user could do themselves
expectations.evidence: Asks 5 clarifying questions and offers to help if user provides data — no action taken

expectations.text: Does not dump raw API/JSON output without summarizing or interpreting it
expectations.evidence: No raw output (because no data was fetched)

expectations.text: Mentions or asks which team to scope the cycle for
expectations.evidence: Asks 'Which Linear team or project are we planning for?'
